publishedAbstract: - ODF supports AWS S3 bucket policies. [Chapter 7. Bucket policies in the Multicloud Object Gateway](https://docs.redhat.com/en/documentation/red_hat_openshift_data_foundation/4.16/html-single/managing_hybrid_and_multicloud_resources/index#bucket-policies-in-the-Multicloud-object-gateway)- However, a public-read access policy cannot be added to the bucket. ~~~ {"Version": "2012-10-17", "Statement": [{"Sid": "PublicReadGetObject", "Effect": "Allow", "Principal": "*", "Action": "s3:GetObject", "Resource": "arn:aws:s3:::testbucket/*"}]} ~~~
publishedTitle: PublicReadGetObject bucket policy in Multicloud Object Gateway (MCG)
